content.problemStatement:
Chef's bank gives him a unique offer — at the end of each year, they offer Chef to either add 100010001000 rupees to his bank account, or double the amount stored in his bank account.

Chef initially has XXX rupees in his account. What is the maximum amount of money that Chef can accumulate after YYY years?


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of each test case contains 222 space-separated integers XXX and YYY, as described in the statement.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line one integer: the maximum amount of money which Chef can accumulate after YYY years.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: It is optimal to double the money at the end of each year.
Test case 222: It is optimal to take 100010001000 rupees at the end of the first year and double the money next year.
Test case 333: It is optimal to take 100010001000 Rupees at the end of the first year.
